title: Letter Pack
description:
Letter Pack, as the name suggests, is a mod with many characters.

In this mod, if some characters are just enough to form a word, you can synthesize the item or word corresponding to that word.
body:
# English
Letter Pack, as the name suggests, is a mod with many characters.

In this mod, if some characters are just enough to form a word, you can synthesize the item or word corresponding to that word.

If you play by yourself, you just need to install it on the client. However, if the server has this mod, but the client does not, the client must install it.

*“Note: This mod has been uploaded without my permission to some third-party websites (e.g., MetaMods). Please download only from Modrinth to ensure you have the authentic, latest version (0.0.8+).”*

# Chinese
Letter Pack，顾名思义，是一个有很多字符的模组。

在这个模组中，如果某些字符刚好足以组成一个单词，你可以合成与该单词相对应的物品或单词。

如果是自己玩，仅需在客户端装就行。但是，如果服务器里有这个模组，但是客户端没有，则客户端必须装。

*“注意：此模组未经我的许可已被上传到一些第三方网站（例如 MetaMods）。请仅从 Modrinth 下载，以确保您获得正版最新版本（0.0.8）。”*
